events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **fail**, high risk. A failed vacuum decay test indicates an unresolved leak or residual moisture/non-condensables in the brazed system — this is a stop-work condition under EPA 608 and ACCA guidance until leak search, re-brazing of suspect joints, and a successful re-evacuation/decay retest are completed before charging.
